title: Converted: Enneatype 4 - The Individualist - Unhealthy Levels
description: Structured conversion of legacy contentData[181]. The original legacy slide remains available for comparison.

items: Failure of dreams leads to self-inhibition, self-anger, depression, and alienation. They might feel ashamed and fatigued, unable to function effectively.
They might become tormented by extreme self-contempt, blaming others and pushing away anyone who tries to help. They become a source of their own torment.

In despair and feeling hopeless, they might resort to self-destructive behaviors such as substance abuse. In extreme cases, they are prone to emotional breakdowns or suicide. This level generally corresponds to severe Avoidant, Depressive, and Narcissistic personality disorders.
